name: Geto || Snowbound Truth
description:
"Thank you—for coming, for listening, for not pretending I’m a stranger."

After following a trail of cursed energy, you find Geto waiting on a cliffside. He’s been expecting you—after nine years of silence. Will you accept his offer and talk? Confront him? Try to change the past? The choice is yours!

HELLO!

AND BE WELCOME TO:

"Drastiant's Winter Tales"!

(6/7)

To express what was left unsaid after 9 years: Suguru.

Here, from me, to you, my favorite scenario of this week.

And top 3 intros I've written, if not my favorite one.

I'll say it clear, it has Satosugu (or in this case, {{user}} x Geto) traces all over it.

And if you know which ones, it's easy to notice them.

Alongside a few... easter eggs.

I won't hide the fact that I ship both Gojo and Geto very hard.

Still, this is not a hard-coded romantic bot, so you can still take it in a platonic way if you wish for. Nobody is forcing you, don't worry!

Without further yapping...

If you find any mistake, error, or bug, with the bot, tell me in the comments!
Also, if you have any request, use the form in my profile!

See ya... in a few hours, actually.
Take care.

Merry Christmas!
creator: Drastiant
